steps.title: Identify what needs a possessive form
steps.content: The sentence refers to two locations: Arteaga and Lagos de Moreno. The blank must modify “natural beauty and unique cultural traditions” to show these belong to the towns.

steps.title: Apply the plural possessive rule
steps.content: A plural noun ending in -s adds an apostrophe only to form its possessive: towns'. This is the only form that correctly expresses possession; A and C lack the apostrophe, and B uses the singular form. This matches choice D — D is correct.
